task_completion.description: Open a chart displaying SPY on a Daily timeframe
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is open with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or 'D') visible in the window title, tab, or chart legend.

task_completion.description: Add AAPL as a secondary data series to the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart displays a second set of price data (candlesticks, bars, or lines), and 'AAPL' is visible in the chart legend or data series configuration.

task_completion.description: Overlay both instruments on the same price panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both the SPY and AAPL price series share the exact same main chart area (Panel 1). They are NOT separated into top and bottom sub-panels.

task_completion.description: Apply a 50-period SMA indicator to the SPY data series
task_completion.visual_evidence: A moving average line is visible on the chart, and the chart legend shows 'SMA(50)' associated with the SPY instrument.

task_completion.description: Apply a 50-period SMA indicator to the AAPL data series
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second moving average line is visible on the chart, and the chart legend shows a second 'SMA(50)' associated with the AAPL instrument.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the 'Workspaces' -> 'Save' menu in the Control Center, or the active workspace name in the Control Center footer no longer has a grey asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart and indicators
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader dialog boxes (e.g., Data Series, Indicators) rather than terminal commands or editing XML/text files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader 8 Control Center and Chart windows are visible with standard UI elements, not mockups, text editors, or image manipulation software.

integrity.description: The chart displays actual price data for SPY and AAPL
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart shows standard financial data with appropriate price scales (SPY around 300-500, AAPL around 100-200) and dates spanning 2023-2024, rather than manually drawn lines or placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Primary instrument is SPY, secondary is AAPL. Timeframe is Daily. Both instruments must be overlaid on the exact same chart panel. Two SMA indicators are required, both with a period of 50, one applied to each instrument. The data spans 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31.
